diagrams.title: Directory Creation Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the mkdir() system call process from calling the function to successful directory creation or error handling
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the step-by-step process of directory creation and error conditions

diagrams.title: Directory Removal Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the rmdir() system call process and conditions for successful removal
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the conditions that must be met before removing a directory

diagrams.title: Directory Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of a UNIX directory tree showing parent-child relationships and special entries
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how directories are organized and how . and .. entries connect them

visuals.title: Mkdir And Rmdir Functions
visuals.description: Visual diagram for mkdir and rmdir functions
